data.content: Implementation complete: bumped all font sizes one step larger and strengthened text contrast across the Conversation Log section (SessionEntryRow, SessionCard, InteractionPicker). Changes: text-[9px]→[10px], text-[10px]→[11px], text-[11px]→[12px], text-[13px]→[14px]; contrast slate-500→400, slate-400→300, slate-300→200, sky-200→100; background opacity increased on entry cards; inline icon sizes bumped. All quality gates pass (0 lint errors, clean typecheck, 155 test files pass, build succeeds). Commit 4793a2f29e5b pushed to main.
